name: Slurm QOS Account Limit Triage
summary: Collect read-only evidence for Slurm account, QOS, and fairshare limits.
description: This skill helps users and support teams investigate pending jobs caused by Slurm association limits, QOS limits, invalid accounts, invalid QOS values, fairshare pressure, and TRES-minute policy without modifying scheduler state.

tools.name: sacctmgr
tools.notes: Visibility into associations and QOS records depends on site policy.

tools.name: sshare
tools.notes: Useful when fairshare information is exposed by the site.

inputs.name: job_id
inputs.description: Optional pending Slurm job id to inspect for QOS, account, and association-related reasons.

inputs.name: user
inputs.description: User whose visible associations, fairshare, and pending jobs should be inspected.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Local directory where the read-only evidence bundle should be written.

outputs.name: limit_triage_report
outputs.description: Local text report directory with queue, job, association, QOS, fairshare, and priority evidence.

outputs.name: review_prompts
outputs.description: Public-safe prompts for interpreting association and QOS limit reason strings.

outputs.name: offline_policy_review
outputs.description: Pending reason category and visible account, QOS, TRES, and fairshare field coverage.

examples.title: Collect Slurm QOS and account limit evidence
Review saved queue and policy evidence

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Check shell syntax without contacting Slurm.
Classify a synthetic association limit against visible policy fields.
Run on a Slurm site with a pending job and confirm the report only reads scheduler and accounting state.
